codeReview.summary: The fix addresses both prior failure points in scope: `POST /policy/access-mode` now requires trusted-session handshake credentials before mutating policy state, and approval resolution rolls the approval back to pending when the gated action can no longer dispatch because its target is unavailable.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Shared API/security notes still describe the handshake inputs themselves, but they do not record that `POST /policy/access-mode` now requires those same trusted-session parameters and fails closed without them. Future workers touching policy/settings flows may have to rediscover that contract from `bridge-core` code.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: /Users/lubomirmolin/PhpstormProjects/codex-mobile-companion/.factory/library/security.md:14-20 and .factory/library/api.md:23-26 document handshake/auth surfaces but not the new access-mode auth requirement; crates/bridge-core/src/lib.rs:914-969 now rejects unauthenticated access-mode mutations unless `phone_id`, `bridge_id`, and `session_token` pass trusted-session authorization.

summary: Reviewed the prior failed review, fix handoff/transcript skeleton, skill, mission docs, and commit `1b50e90235eddfa4fbd1c33d2a76e418a6e9e3ef`. Result: pass; the access-mode escalation hole is closed and stale-target approval attempts no longer leave approvals falsely resolved.
